visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a brightly lit indoor studio with teal curtains in the background. A man with brown hair (Cai Weijia), wearing a blue vest labeled '1', is shouting and gesturing wildly toward a person wearing a large, orange, stylized cartoon head mask and a teal dress. The man's facial expressions are highly exaggerated, with an open mouth and wide eyes. (2) A woman with her hair tied in a bun, wearing a pink vest labeled '2', enters the frame and begins pointing aggressively at the masked character while speaking. The background shelf holds various anime figurines and a Kanagawa wave print. (3) The man in the blue vest reacts with mock shock as fire graphics are edited over the screen. He adjusts his vest and points to the association logo. The person in the mask stands with their hands on their hips, nodding. (4) The masked person points to themselves and holds up fingers while text overlays appear detailing '28 teams' and '3800 residents'. The man in the blue vest continues his animated interjections, frequently waving his hands in front of the camera. (5) Information about registration dates (October 26) and the eligibility of college clubs is presented through large text overlays. The characters interact in a fast-paced manner, shifting between medium shots and close-ups. (6) The three characters stand together for a closing segment. The man in the blue vest points toward the bottom of the screen, indicating a link. The scene ends with a comedic argument, visualized with small flame icons next to their heads as they joke about who performed the most work.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 妳看這傢伙!!. (2) [Subtitle]: 肖想要參選. (3) [Subtitle]: 我們好里家理事長. (4) [Slogan]: 想幹掉我. (5) [Variety]: 嘿 嘿. (6) [Subtitle]: 嘎哥只要有手機 網路就可以工作好不好. (7) [Subtitle]: 台灣工作跟在日本工作 不是一樣嗎. (8) [Subtitle]: 那好里家做了哪些事情 你知道嗎. (9) [Subtitle]: 欸!! 我理事長!! 我不知道??. (10) [Subtitle]: 28支營隊. 服務3800位居民. (11) [Subtitle]: 第六屆要開始報名了是嗎. (12) [Subtitle]: 報名到什麼時候. (13) [Subtitle]: 第六屆報名時間 2025/10/26. (14) [Slogan]: 大專院校社團 自組型的志願服務隊. (15) [Subtitle]: 服務台灣的孩子就可以來報名. (16) [Subtitle]: 總共提供6隊 每隊5萬元獎金. (17) [Slogan]: hahababy30件聯名團服. (18) [Logo]: 好里家社福協會. (19) [Subtitle]: 他是不是都不知道 都是我們在講的. (20) [Variety]: 好了啦緯嘉哥哥.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 female creator, 1 person wearing a cartoon mask.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One man in a blue campaign-style vest and white pants; one woman in a pink and teal vest; one person in a teal dress wearing a large orange cartoon mask.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A home studio environment featuring a teal curtain, a brown leather sofa, and shelves filled with various toys, figurines, and Japanese-style artwork.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) An energetic, high-pitched male voice begins shouting with high arousal over an upbeat, comedic synthesizer-driven BGM. A 'whoosh' SFX signals a visual transition. (2) A clear female voice enters, speaking at a rapid pace. A 'pop' SFX sounds as she makes a point, while the music maintains a steady, driving beat. (3) A 'ding' SFX occurs as graphics appear, and the primary male speaker increases his volume to an exaggerated shouting level. (4) A second male voice (the masked character) speaks with an animated but slightly calmer tone. A 'bubble' sound effect punctuates his list of achievements. (5) Fast-paced vocal interplay between all three speakers continues, accompanied by frequent 'Cartoon/Comedy SFX' emphasizing their hand gestures. (6) The audio track ends with a sharp 'stinger' SFX as the music and dialogue cut off simultaneously during a humorous group argument.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the 'Great College Welfare' program by the Hao Li Jia Social Welfare Association, encouraging college student groups to apply for funding and sponsorships.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of the association's name, program details, and specific brand collaboration for uniforms.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy variety-show editing with dense text overlays typical of Taiwanese social media content.
